description: AI-generate a publication-quality scientific schematic (CONSORT flow, patient timeline, diagnostic algorithm) from a natural-language prompt via OpenRouter / Nano Banana.
rules: calls a remote LLM image API (OpenRouter) — requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY, the requests library, and network
DOC_TYPE (optional) sets the quality threshold: journal, conference, poster, presentation, report, grant, thesis, preprint, default
the image is written to record_store/schematic.png; an audit JSON (status + prompt + image path) is always written to schematic.json
degrades gracefully offline: with no API key the step still records a schematic.json with status skipped_no_api_key
usage: Set SCHEMATIC_PROMPT (diagram description) and optionally DOC_TYPE; export OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Outputs: schematic.png (when online) + schematic.json.
limitation: Cannot run offline — image generation needs a network call to OpenRouter and the requests package. The audit JSON is produced either way so the contract holds.

vars.SCHEMATIC_PROMPT: CONSORT participant flow diagram for a two-arm RCT
